name: vite-plugin-auto-origin
description: Vite plugin that configures origin url for dev server automatically
author: Simon Praetorius

scripts.test:distribution: npm run test:distribution:pack && npm run test:distribution:esm && npm run test:distribution:ts
scripts.test:distribution:pack: npm pack --pack-destination tests/distribution/ && cd tests/distribution/ && tar xzf vite-plugin-auto-origin*.tgz
scripts.test:distribution:esm: cd tests/distribution/javascript-esm/ && npm install && npm run build
scripts.test:distribution:ts: cd tests/distribution/typescript/ && npm install && npm run build && npm run typecheck
